channel.title: Typia Blog
channel.description: Engineering notes, releases, and deep dives from Typia.

item.title: Function Calling Harness: From 6.75% to 100%
item.description: 6.75% first-try function calling success becomes 100% compilation via type schemas, compilers, and structured feedback. Dissecting the harness engineering behind AutoBe and Typia.

item.title: Bun is up to 20x slower than NodeJS in logic operations
item.description: typia is a transformer library supporting superfast runtime validation, and JSON serialization function boosting up performance by AoT (Ahead of Time) optimization skill.

item.title: [Typia] executable demo site of 20,000x faster validator (serializer)
item.description: I've published an executable playground website of typia to demonstrate how typia is easier than other runtime validation (serialization) libraries, and describe what the AoT...

item.title: [Typia] I made Protocol Buffer library of TypeScript, easiest in the world
item.description: typia has started supporting Protocol Buffer functions.

item.title: [Typia] Hidden Class Optimization of v8 Engine
item.description: Let's study why typia is much faster than class-validator.

item.title: Good bye and thanks to \"typescript-is\" (ancestor of \"typia\")
item.description: Long time ago, there had been a great validator library named typescript-is.

item.title: [Typia] I made realtime demo site of 20,000x faster validation (+200x faster JSON stringify)
item.description: I've made a playground website to help you understand how typia works with AoT compilation.

item.title: I made Express faster than Fastify (100x faster JSON, also NestJS)
item.description: During the study, I could understand why fastify is faster than express. Also, I did an experiment imitating the secret of the fastify in express with typia's faster JSON...

item.title: [Typia] 15,000x faster TypeScript Validator and its histories
item.description: Hello, I'm developer of typescript-json typia.

item.title: I made 10x faster JSON.stringify() functions, even type safe
item.description: Hello, I'm a developer of typescript-json, which can validate instance type by only one line, what I'd introduced as "1,000x faster runtime validator library" in here dev.to.

item.title: I made 1,000x faster TypeScript Validator Library
item.description: Hello, I'm developer of typescript-json and have measure a benchmark comparing performance with other...
